ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Continued To Nov-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Continued To Oct-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Pam Hellon and Attorney Nicole D. Rosser to appear on Oct-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date. A Status on the Issuance of Letters in related matter, PES-22-305208 (Estate of Stanley Coffin), is set for Oct-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Continued To Sep-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicole Rosser appeared by zoom for Pam Hellon.

The court noted that on March 8th counsel was ordered to file a petition for approval of a status report by June 17th, and that it was not done. Ms. Rosser apologized to the court stating that she did not realize that that was part of the order and did not realize that she needed to do that, that she received status from counsel in the other matter which is being heard on July 13th, and that it is her understanding that there are still some problems with those probate notes. Ms. Rosser also stated that those notes should be cleared, that based on her conversation with Mr. Peoples, it will hopefully be approved on the 13th, and that once someone is appointed in that case, she can file an amended petition. The court noted that it does not have an original will in Stanley's case and that they may need to amend their petition. Ms. Rosser stated that it is her understanding that they located an original will and that her client sent it over to Mr. Peoples. The court explained the process in this county as to closing of estates, and explained that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is required to be filed two weeks before the status hearing date. Ms. Rosser suggested a 90-day continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to September 27, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Rosser is to have either one of said petitions filed by September 13, 2022.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicole Rosser and Ron Peoples, via ZOOM, for Pam Hellon, Administrator.

The court reminds counsel of its directives from the previous calling of this matter specifically regarding opening a probate for Stanley Coffin's Estate. Ms. Rosser reports that an estate proceeding has not yet been filed for Stanley's estate and reports that Mr. Peoples is ready to do so. The court advises counsel regarding the procedural issues in this matter and that it is inclined to take the petition off calendar. Mr. Peoples reports regarding the issues which caused the delay on opening Stanley's estate. After additional discussion, the court confirms its tentative ruling.

The First and Final Report, etc., is taken off calendar. A Status on Close of Estate is set for Jun-28-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court advises that if a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Jun-17-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-01-2022 Continued To Mar-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-04-2022 Continued To Feb-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Continued To Jan-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicole Rosser and Ron Peoples, via ZOOM, for Pam Hellon, Administrator.

The court queries counsel regarding a probate petition for Stanley has been filed. Ms. Rosser reports that she will be bringing Mr. Peoples on as co-counsel to handle the petition for Stanley. Mr. Peoples confirms that as soon as he is retained as counsel, he will file the petition. The court instructs counsel to notify the Examiner once the petition is filed and provide the new case number. The court asks if the petition on calendar today should be taken off calendar. Mr. Peoples requests a two (2) month continuance instead to avoid having to refile the petition. The court asks counsel if there are other known assets aside from the real property. Ms. Rosser advises that she does not believe that there any additional assets.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is continued to Jan-04-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-07-2021 Continued To Oct-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicole Rosser, via Court Call, for Pam Hellon, Administrator.

The court begins by querying counsel regarding the status of a petition for probate for the post-deceased beneficiary. Counsel reports that she has reached-out to local attorneys regarding the preceding and to take this matter but that she has not received any replies. The court advises counsel that it will be granting a continuance but if the previously mentioned petition has not been filed by the next calling of this matter, the petition in this matter will be taken off calendar.

The Accounting Petition is continued to 10/26/2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
